prefs.title: Automatically Check for Update
prefs.summary: Enable or Disable Auto Check for Update. This will disable the popup inside the WhatsApp Application.

prefs.title: Lite Mode
prefs.summary: Lite Mode disables most theme features and the connection bridge that keeps WhatsApp always active is turned off.

prefs.title: Show Hook Loading Toast
prefs.summary: Show toast and snackbar notifications during hook initialization and when hooks finish loading

prefs.title: Share Anonymous Crash Logs
prefs.summary: Help us fix bugs by sharing anonymous crash logs to Firebase Crashlytics.

sub_screens.title: Home Screen
sub_screens.summary: Toolbar style, name, bio, tabs, groups & filters

prefs.title: Show WaEnhancerX Home Menu
prefs.summary: %s

prefs.title: Show Name
prefs.summary: Show your profile name at the top of home screen, instead of "WhatsApp"

prefs.title: Show Bio
prefs.summary: Show your bio below the title of toolbar

prefs.title: Show DND Button
prefs.summary: Show button for DND Mode on home screen toolbar

prefs.title: Long-Press FAB for New Chat
prefs.summary: Start a chat with any phone number by long-pressing the home screen action button

prefs.title: Enable Restart Button
prefs.summary: Add button in Home Screen to Restart App

prefs.title: Settings Entry Point Placement
prefs.summary: %s

prefs.title: Open WaEnhancerX Settings as
prefs.summary: %s

prefs.title: Separate Groups
prefs.summary: Separate your chats by: Groups, Private Chats, Status, Calls, Communities

prefs.title: Separate Groups Counter
prefs.summary: %s

prefs.title: New UI Group Filter
prefs.summary: Disabled: This feature is currently incompatible with the latest WhatsApp build due to significant internal layout changes. It will be restored in a future update.

prefs.title: Show Online Dot in Conversation List
prefs.summary:
Show a green online dot on home screen
(NOTE: Must activate show online for everyone in WhatsApp\'s Privacy Settings menu)

prefs.title: Show Online/Last seen in Conversation List
prefs.summary:
Show a text online or last seen on home screen
(NOTE: Must activate show online for everyone in WhatsApp\'s Privacy Settings menu)

prefs.title: Enable filter chats for type
prefs.summary: Show options to filter chats for groups, contacts and unseen messages

prefs.title: Disable Meta Ai Functions
prefs.summary: Disable meta ai only for those who have it enabled by default

prefs.title: Search Functions
prefs.summary: Choose between Search Icon, Search Bar, or No Search

prefs.title: Disable Status in the profile photo
prefs.summary: Disables the circle that appears in the profile photo of each contact when there is new status

prefs.title: Menu Icons
prefs.summary: Add icons next to menu options across the app

sub_screens.title: Conversation
sub_screens.summary: Anti-revoke, deleted colors, forward limits & tools

prefs.title: Show toast on contact online
prefs.summary: Show a toast when a contact is online

prefs.title: Show toast notification on delete message
prefs.summary: Show toast notification if any contact deletes any message

prefs.title: Show toast on viewed your message
prefs.summary: Shows a toast if someone views your message

prefs.title: Anti-Revoke Messages
prefs.summary: Messages will not be deleted for you

prefs.title: Anti-Delete Status
prefs.summary: View statuses that users have since deleted

prefs.title: Deleted Message Color
prefs.summary: Customize the text color of deleted messages (includes message text and timestamp text)

prefs.title: Anti Disappearing Messages
prefs.summary: Temporary messages will not be deleted for you

prefs.title: Show chat broadcast icon
prefs.summary: Shows an icon if the contact sent a message via broadcast

prefs.title: Disable Pinned Chats Limit
prefs.summary: Disable limit of 3 pinned chats

prefs.title: Remove Forward Limit
prefs.summary:
Remove forward limit for 5 chats (normal) and 1 chat (multiple times)
(Note: Use with caution, you may be banned for spam)

prefs.title: Custom Forward Limit
prefs.summary: Set a custom max forward limit for chat selection (default: 9999)

prefs.title: Hide "Forwarded" Tag
prefs.summary: Forward messages without the tag "Forwarded"

prefs.title: Increase limit of "Delete for everyone" option
prefs.summary: Increases the limit to 3 days in the option to delete messages for everyone

prefs.title: Remove "See More" Button
prefs.summary: Disable "See More" button and show all long message

prefs.title: Show Edited Message History
prefs.summary: Show edited message history when clicking "Edited" on a message

prefs.title: Confirmation Before Sending Sticker
prefs.summary: Show a dialog before sending the sticker

prefs.title: Enable selection of call type
prefs.summary: Show an option to select whether you want a call via phone or WhatsApp

prefs.title: Disable Default Emojis
prefs.summary:
Disables Whatsapp\'s default emojis and uses system emojis
(NOTE: Whatsapp emojis will disappear from the selector, use the keyboard to insert).

prefs.title: Remove Stamp from Copied Messages
prefs.summary: Removes name and date when copying more than one message

prefs.title: Show Message Device Source
prefs.summary: Shows whether a message was sent from the primary device or a linked device

prefs.title: Enable Double Click to React
prefs.summary: Activates the possibility of double-clicking on the message to react it

prefs.title: Custom Reaction
prefs.summary: Select which reaction will be sent when double clicking on the message

prefs.title: Make Message Text Selectable
prefs.summary: Long-pressing message text opens a bottom sheet to select and copy text. Native selection is disabled to prevent scrolling lag and format issues.

prefs.title: Enable Google Translate
prefs.summary: Replaces Whatsapp\'s native translator with Google Translate

prefs.title: Show Contact Blocked in Conversation
prefs.summary: Disabled due to recent WhatsApp updates patching this method.

prefs.title: Go to First Message
prefs.summary: Add menu option to scroll to first message in chat

prefs.title: Filter Group Members
prefs.summary: Add menu option in group chats to filter members\' messages

prefs.title: Show Admin Group Icon
prefs.summary: Show an admin icon next to the name of the user who is the group admin

prefs.title: New Context Menu UI
prefs.summary: The new iOS-style message context menu will be enabled.

prefs.title: Animation Emojis
prefs.summary: Activate animated emojis (This creates large emojis in conversations)

prefs.title: Message Bomber
prefs.summary: Under Development

prefs.title: Delete message media file
prefs.summary: Under Development

prefs.title: Also apply for my sent messages
prefs.summary: Show the delete option for your own sent media messages as well.

categories.title: Privacy
categories.summary: Ghost mode, freeze last seen, tick options & incognito

sub_screens.title: Stealth & Privacy
sub_screens.summary: Ghost mode, freeze last seen, tick options & incognito

prefs.title: Hide Archived Chats
prefs.summary: Hide archived chats, to access click 5 times or hold on the "WhatsApp" title in the header on Home Screen

entries.label: Click 5 times on the WhatsApp title

prefs.title: Show Freeze Last Seen Button
prefs.summary: Show button for Freezing Last Seen on home screen toolbar

prefs.title: Show Ghost Mode Button
prefs.summary: Show a Ghost Mode button on the home screen toolbar

prefs.title: Always Online
prefs.summary: Show you online even if you minimize WhatsApp (Doesn\'t work if you remove it from recents)

prefs.title: Enhanced Locked Chats
prefs.summary: Improve locked chats by hiding notifications and contacts from the contact list

prefs.title: Deleted By Me
prefs.summary: View messages deleted by others

prefs.title: Custom Privacy per contact
prefs.summary: Activate the custom privacy button on the contact information screen

prefs.title: Freeze Last Seen
prefs.summary:
Your last seen time will be frozen
(CAUTION: You will not see any presence updates from other users, like typing, recording, online)

prefs.title: Hide Blue Ticks
prefs.summary: View messages within conversation screen without users knowing

prefs.title: View Seen Tick
prefs.summary: Show an icon if the message view was sent to the recipient or unique view was seen

prefs.title: Send Blue Ticks upon Reply
prefs.summary:
Sends blue ticks after replying to a message
(NOTE: Must have "Hide Blue Ticks" active)

prefs.title: Hide Blue Tick in Groups
prefs.summary: View messages in groups screen without users knowing

prefs.title: Hide Delivered
prefs.summary:
Users will not know that their messages have been delivered to you
(CAUTION: May cause delay in receiving messages)

prefs.title: Hide Typing
prefs.summary: Users cannot see that you are typing

prefs.title: Hide Recording Audio
prefs.summary: Users cannot see that you are recording audio

prefs.title: Hide View Once Seen
prefs.summary: Hide that view one media has been seen

prefs.title: Hide audio seen
prefs.summary: Hides the sending of audio reading when listening to it

prefs.title: Unlimited View Once
prefs.summary: Allows you to open view once media multiple times

prefs.title: Show Button to send blue tick
prefs.summary: Show Button to send blue tick (mark as read/viewed)

prefs.title: Hide Status View
prefs.summary: View statuses without users knowing

sub_screens.summary: Download status, status style, splitters & custom rules

prefs.title: Disable Auto Skip Status
prefs.summary: Prevents the current status from advancing automatically to the next one.

prefs.title: Enable Copy Status
prefs.summary: Activates the possibility of copying the description and caption of statuses by holding on them

prefs.title: Show toast on viewed your status
prefs.summary: Shows a toast if someone views your status

prefs.title: Enable Spy Tool
prefs.summary: Logs internal events to Xposed log for debugging.

prefs.title: Enable IGStatus on Home Screen
prefs.summary: Show status style Instagram in Home Screen

prefs.title: Hide Channels
prefs.summary: Hide Channels from Updates tab

prefs.title: Remove Channel Recomendations
prefs.summary: Remove Channel Recomendations from tab Status

prefs.title: Disable Status Ads
prefs.summary: Blocks ads from appearing in WhatsApp status stories

prefs.title: Style of Stories/Status
prefs.summary: Changes Stories/Status style to some models available on WhatsApp

prefs.title: Old Statuses
prefs.summary: Change to the old statuses page vertically and without channels (NOTE: May cause lag in the interface)

prefs.title: Custom colors for text status
prefs.summary: Press and hold on the color selector in the status to customize it

prefs.title: Send Audio as Voice Status
prefs.summary: Under Development

prefs.title: Enable Auto Status Forward
prefs.summary: Automatically forward your status to a contact when they reply to it with a matching keyword. Leave rules empty to forward on any reply.

prefs.title: Status Video Splitter
prefs.summary: Under Development

prefs.title: Remove bottom visible tile
prefs.summary: Under Development

prefs.title: Disable Swipe Up to reply
prefs.summary: Under Development

prefs.title: Remove quick reactions row
prefs.summary: Under Development

prefs.title: Remove heart button
prefs.summary: Under Development

prefs.title: Add option to menu to open reply
prefs.summary: Under Development

prefs.title: Long press to fast forward/rewind
prefs.summary: Under Development

prefs.title: Playback speed

prefs.title: Show play/pause button in bottom bar

prefs.summary: Block WhatsApp calls based on privacy type

prefs.summary: Select the method by which the call blocking will be done.

prefs.title: Enable Call Recording
prefs.summary: Record incoming and outgoing calls (Voice & Video) as audio.

prefs.title: Manage recordings in calls tab
prefs.summary: Enable "Manage Recordings" option in WhatsApp calls tab menu

prefs.title: Show Recording Notifications
prefs.summary: Show a toast when recording starts or stops.

prefs.title: Recording Settings
prefs.summary: Choose how call audio is captured. Root mode provides better quality but requires a rooted device.

prefs.title: Manage Recordings
prefs.summary: Browse, play, share and delete saved call recordings.

prefs.title: HD Quality Images
prefs.summary: Send images in HD quality, by default

prefs.title: Download and Share Status
prefs.summary: Shows two buttons to share and download status

prefs.title: Download View Once
prefs.summary: Show button to download view once media

prefs.title: Save Video Notes
prefs.summary: Enable long press on video note to save it to the gallery

prefs.title: HD Quality Videos
prefs.summary: Send videos in HD quality, by default

prefs.title: Send Video in Real Resolution
prefs.summary: Send Video in Real Resolution for status, group and chats

prefs.title: Send Video in 60fps
prefs.summary: Send Video in 60 fps for status, group and chats

prefs.title: [Experimental] Video Note Features
prefs.summary: Add a "Video Note" button to the attachment menu and allow sending shared videos as video notes

prefs.title: Enable Media Preview
prefs.summary: Add a button to preview media in a temporary file (without downloading it permanently)

prefs.summary: Add a button in the send preview screen to spoof the displayed file size shown to the recipient

prefs.title: Disable WhatsApp Expiration
prefs.summary: Deactivates the expired version of WhatsApp, (Note: Manual Disable to update WhatsApp on the Play Store or mark the Play Store on LSposed)

prefs.title: Force Restore Backup
prefs.summary: Launch the restore backup screen manually. Use this if you skipped restoration during setup.

prefs.title: Disable Version Check
prefs.summary: Disables the supported version check of WhatsApp (Bugs may occur in unsupported versions that will not be fixed soon)

prefs.title: Customize Supported Versions
prefs.summary: Allow adding and modifying supported WhatsApp versions

prefs.title: Manage Supported Versions
prefs.summary: Add, edit, or delete custom supported versions

prefs.title: Bootloader Spoofer
prefs.summary: Use this if you have been banned and are receiving the unofficial Whatsapp message

prefs.title: Enable Custom KeyBox
prefs.summary: Use this if you have been banned and are receiving the unofficial Whatsapp message

prefs.title: Use Custom keybox.xml file
prefs.summary: No file selected

prefs.title: Verify Spoofer
prefs.summary: Check spoofer trust chain, keys, and expiration

prefs.title: Seconds on Timestamp
prefs.summary: Show seconds next to any timestamp in the WhatsApp app

prefs.title: Text next to Timestamp
prefs.summary: Show text next to any timestamp in the WhatsApp app
